_schema.purpose: Auto-maintained ledger of every view's evidence, ONE ENTRY PER VIEW (per-view folder). Drives evidence/INDEX.html (build_index.py) and tells both agents what evidence exists and its parity verdict. v2: per-view folders replace the old by-type folders so a human can actually follow one view's files.
invariants: One folder per view at evidence/<folder>/ holding legacy.* and react.* plus source-model.json, nav-path.json, parity/.
Every view in STATUS.md with status >= 'analyzed' has an entry here; quarantined error captures are listed in 'rejected', NOT promoted as evidence.
sha256 (in each capture.json) lets a re-run detect changed captures.

view_entry_shape.data_mode: record|live (how the React side gets REAL data)
view_entry_shape.usable: true only if the legacy capture passed readiness + is not an error page
view_entry_shape.isError: true if the captured page was an error/wrong view (then it lives under _rejected/)
view_entry_shape.navPathFromStart: the from-start click-path used to reach this view (mirrors nav-path.json)
